name: Salmon and Dill Tortellini Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Add tortellini to a large pan of boiling salted water. Simmer until just tender.
2. Drain and rinse the tortellini under cold water, then cool it.
3. Combine the cooled tortellini with flaked salmon and remaining ingredients in a large bowl.
4. Just before serving, drizzle with dill dressing.
